flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at Indiana University-Southeast vs the 2018–2022 baseline (3.1k vs 3.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Indiana University-Southeast fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Indiana University-Southeast rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (21.7% → 25.7%).
